about.label: About Me
about.heading: Bridging the gap between design & engineering.
about.p1: Hello! I'm Alif Bima Pradana, a dedicated professional creating impactful digital solutions. With a strong background in Computer Science and a deep passion for User Interface, I help brands translate their vision into digital reality.
about.p2: My work philosophy is simple: code quality is just as important as visual aesthetics. I ensure every pixel is precise and every line of code is efficient.
